de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst

Class ContextInstantiationEntry

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst.InstantiationEntry<ContextStatementBlockInstantiation>
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst.ContextInstantiationEntry

  • public class ContextInstantiationEntry
extends InstantiationEntry<ContextStatementBlockInstantiation>
    This class is used to store the information about a matched context of a dl formula. (the pi and omega part) TODO: Check if there is a need for ContextStatementBlockInstantiation or if it could be unified with this class

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ContextInstantiationEntry(PosInProgram pi, PosInProgram omega, ExecutionContext activeStatementContext, ProgramElement pe)
      creates a new ContextInstantiationEntry

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ExecutionContext activeStatementContext()
      returns the execution context of the first active statement or null if match is performed outer most
      ProgramElement contextProgram()
      returns the context program with an ignorable part between prefix and suffix position
      PosInProgram prefix()
      returns the position of the first statement after the prefix
      PosInProgram suffix()
      returns the position of the statement just before the suffix starts
      String toString()
      toString

      • Methods inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst.InstantiationEntry

        equals, getInstantiation, hashCode

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, finalize, getClass, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • ContextInstantiationEntry

        ContextInstantiationEntry(PosInProgram pi,
                         PosInProgram omega,
                         ExecutionContext activeStatementContext,
                         ProgramElement pe)
        creates a new ContextInstantiationEntry
        Parameters:
        pi - the PosInProgram describing the position of the first statement after the prefix
        omega - the PosInProgram describing the position of the statement just before the suffix starts
        activeStatementContext - the ExecutionContext of the first active statement
        pe - the ProgramElement the context positions are related to

    • Method Detail

      • prefix

        public PosInProgram prefix()
        returns the position of the first statement after the prefix
        Returns:
        the position of the first statement after the prefix

      • suffix

        public PosInProgram suffix()
        returns the position of the statement just before the suffix starts
        Returns:
        the position of the statement just before the suffix starts

      • contextProgram

        public ProgramElement contextProgram()
        returns the context program with an ignorable part between prefix and suffix position

      • activeStatementContext

        public ExecutionContext activeStatementContext()
        returns the execution context of the first active statement or null if match is performed outer most

        toString
